config.name: aws_cloudwatch_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: aws_cloudwatch_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (2001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:00:08.524808

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Validation patterns
local IP_PATTERN = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"
local UUID_PATTERN = "^[0-9a-fA-F%-]+$"

-- Initialize empty tables once
local function init_endpoint()
    return {ip = nil, port = nil}
end

local function init_cloud()
    return {account = {uid = nil}}
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local references
    local output = {
        class_uid = 2001,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 2,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 200101,
        src_endpoint = init_endpoint(),
        dst_endpoint = init_endpoint(),
        cloud = init_cloud(),
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "AWS CloudWatch",
                vendor_name = "AWS"
            }
        }
    }

    -- Efficient field transformations using locals
    local src_addr = record.srcaddr
    if src_addr and src_addr:match(IP_PATTERN) then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = src_addr
    end

    local dst_addr = record.dstaddr  
    if dst_addr and dst_addr:match(IP_PATTERN) then
        output.dst_endpoint.ip = dst_addr
    end

    -- Handle account ID with validation
    local account_id = record["account-id"]
    if account_id and account_id:match(UUID_PATTERN) then
        output.cloud.account.uid = account_id
    end

    -- Optional fields with type checking
    if record.srcport and tonumber(record.srcport) then
        output.src_endpoint.port = tonumber(record.srcport)
    end

    if record.dstport and tonumber(record.dstport) then
        output.dst_endpoint.port = tonumber(record.dstport)
    end

    -- Handle timestamps
    local start_time = record.start
    if start_time and tonumber(start_time) then
        output.time = tonumber(start_time) * 1000 -- Convert to milliseconds
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Validation of required fields
    if not output.src_endpoint.ip and not output.dst_endpoint.ip then
        return nil, "Missing required endpoint information"
    end

    -- Add observability metadata
    output.metadata.processing = {
        timestamp = os_time() * 1000,
        parser_version = "latest"
    }

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
